stacbuildr 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Building a STAC Catalog
    • Comparison with PySTAC

Sign an Azure Blob Storage href using Azure AD authentication.

Source: R/api-signers.R
sign_azure_ad.Rd

Generates a short-lived user delegation SAS token via a managed identity (or any other Azure AD credential accepted by AzureStor). Reads the storage endpoint and container from environment variables so that nothing is hardcoded. Suitable for passing directly as the sign_fn argument of stac_api_router().

Usage

sign_azure_ad(href, expiry_seconds = 3600L)

Arguments

href

Unsigned Azure Blob Storage URL.

expiry_seconds

Lifetime of the signed URL in seconds (default 3600).

Value

A signed URL string with a SAS token appended.

Details

Required environment variables:

  • AZURE_STORAGE_ENDPOINT — full blob service URL, e.g. "https://myaccount.blob.core.windows.net/".

  • AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER — container name, e.g. "stac".

On this page
